title: Tests should not be ignored
description: Tests should not be ignoredAnalyze your codeadaptability-testedmaintainabilityCode Smelltestsbad-practiceconfusingWhy is this an issue?When a test fails due, for example, to infrastructure issues, you might want to ignore it temporarily. But without some kind of notation about why the test is being ignored, it may never be reactivated. Such tests are difficult to address without comprehensive knowledge of the project, and end up polluting their projects.This rule raises an issue for each ignored test that does not have aWorkItemattribute nor a comment about why it is being skipped on the right side of theIgnoreattribute.Noncompliant code example[TestMethod] [Ignore] public void Test_DoTheThing() { // ..
recommendation: Review and fix according to the rule guidelines.

checks.message: Tests should not be ignored without explanation - add reason or WorkItem

logic.reasoning: Detects [Ignore] attributes without a reason string or WorkItem reference. Ignored tests need documentation for maintainability.
